mapper.sql: id::text AS id, kind, name, summary, description, address, latitude, longitude, main_image_id::text AS "mainImageId", image_ids::text[] AS "imageIds", main_open_yn AS "mainOpenYn", active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM facility
active_yn = ANY(${activeYns}) AND main_open_yn = ANY(${mainOpenYns}) AND kind::text = ANY(${kinds}) AND name ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility ( kind, name, summary, description, address, latitude, longitude, main_image_id, image_ids, main_open_yn, active_yn, sort_order, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{kind}, #{name}, #{summary}, #{description}, ${address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, ${mainImageId}, ${imageIds}, #{mainOpenYn}, #{activeYn}, #{sortOrder}, ${createdBy}, ${createdBy} ) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE facility
kind = #{kind}, name = #{name}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, address = ${address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, main_image_id = ${mainImageId}, image_ids = ${imageIds}, main_open_yn = #{mainOpenYn}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder},
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
